name: kettlebell-sport-amrap
description: Kettlebell sport (Girevoy): max-rep one-arm kettlebell snatch in a fixed 10-minute set, hand-switch allowed. A Block scheme 'amrap' (timeCapSec 600) over one exercise scored by reps, with the result as a rep-count outcome and the no-set-down rule noted.

children.notes: 24 kg; one hand switch, bell not set down
